Youtube Thumbnail Preview is your Ultimate Tool for Perfect Thumbnails and Titles!

Are you a YouTube creator who wants to make your videos stand out above the rest? Do you struggle to visualize how your thumbnails and titles will appear to viewers on YouTube? Look no further! Youtube Thumbnail Preview is the must-have extension designed exclusively for you!

🎥 Accurate Representation: Say goodbye to uncertainty! With our extension, you can now see an accurate representation of your title and thumbnail, just as it will be seen by viewers on YouTube. No more surprises or disappointment after publishing!

🛠️ Seamless Editing: Whether you're uploading a new video or tweaking the details of an existing one, our "Youtube Thumbnail Preview" extension offers real-time visual feedback. Instantly see how your changes impact the overall look and feel of your video on YouTube's homepage.

🌓 Dark and Light Modes: Choose your preferred working environment! Our extension features dark and light modes, perfectly aligned with YouTube's homepage colors. Toggle effortlessly without affecting your browsing experience.

🎯 Targeted for Success: Calling all ambitious YouTubers! If you seek to increase the reach of your videos, Youtube Thumbnail Preview is your secret weapon. Make quick decisions about thumbnails and ensure your content grabs viewers' attention from the very first glance.

🚀 Publish with Confidence: Ensure you're presenting your videos in the best possible light! With our extension, you can fine-tune your thumbnails and titles until they perfectly represent your content. Showcase your videos exactly as you intended, and watch your audience grow!

🔒 Privacy First: Rest assured, your data is safe, even from with us! Youtube Thumbnail Preview is optimized to be as efficient as possible while not collecting any personal user identifiable data. Your identity remains yours alone.

🆓 Completely Free: Yes, you read that right! Youtube Thumbnail Preview is entirely free to use. No hidden charges, no subscriptions, just powerful features at your fingertips without spending a dime!

Say goodbye to guesswork and hello to success! Install the extension now and take your channel to new heights!

ZEN Studyに様々な機能を追加するChrome拡張機能

いくつかの機能を追加・改善し、ZEN Study の使いやすさを向上させます。

1. 動画の合計時間の表示: チャプターページやコースページ、月間レポートページ、マイコースページに含まれる動画の合計時間を表示可能
2. テキスト入力時の単語数の表示: 入力フィールドに文字数とともに単語数を表示可能
3. キーボードショートカット: より良い動画コントロールのショートカットと、セクション移動のショートカットを追加可能
4. Tabキーによる操作の改善: MathJax の Tab キーによるフォーカスを無効化可能
5. 補助テキストのサイズ調整: 動画下部の補助テキストを常時適切なサイズに自動変更可能
6: 動画の固定表示の修正: 動画の固定表示を修正または無効化可能

それぞれの機能は好みに合わせて有効/無効化でき、多くの機能が高度にカスタマイズ可能です。
拡張機能アイコンまたは拡張機能詳細ページからオプションページにアクセスしてください。

より詳細なドキュメント・ソースコード: https://github.com/Level222/zen-study-plus
バグ報告・機能リクエスト等: https://github.com/Level222/zen-study-plus/issues
変更履歴: https://github.com/Level222/zen-study-plus/releases

この拡張機能はオープンソースで開発されており、皆さんの貢献を歓迎しております。バグ修正や新機能の提案など、どんな形でもご協力いただければ幸いです。
Maintain sticky notes for each domain you visit.

Domain Notes — A Notepad for Every Website You Visit

Open any website and your note is right there waiting. Close it, come back a week later — still there. No copy-pasting URLs, no separate apps, no cloud accounts.

How it works

Click the extension icon on any site to open a notepad for that domain. The icon gets a red dot the moment you have a note saved there — so you always know at a glance which sites have something worth remembering.

Built for people who actually browse

Researching a product? Note your thoughts on the retailer's site before you compare elsewhere.
Reading documentation? Keep your questions next to the docs.
Job hunting? Leave notes on every company's website as you go.
Investing? Track your thesis directly on the stock's investor relations page.
Features

Red dot badge on the icon whenever the current site has a note
Per-domain organization — notes live with the site, not in a folder you'll never find
Import & Export notes to take backup and take your notes in other products
All Notes view to search and manage everything in one place
Font picker so the editor feels right to you
100% local storage — your notes never leave your browser, no account required
Privacy

Nothing is sent anywhere. No servers, no sync, no analytics. Your notes live in Chrome's local storage and go nowhere.

Introducing our Chrome extension designed to streamline your client management process with ease and security. With our extension, you can securely store login credentials for your clients directly within Chrome, ensuring convenient access whenever you need it.

One of the standout features is seamless synchronization across multiple devices, allowing you to access your client credentials wherever you go. Whether you're in the office, on the go, or working remotely, your data is always at your fingertips.

Our extension prioritizes user-friendliness, with an intuitive interface that makes saving and retrieving credentials a breeze. Say goodbye to the hassle of managing multiple client logins across different platforms.

For professionals handling multiple clients, our extension is a game-changer. It provides a centralized hub for securely storing and accessing client credentials, streamlining your workflow and saving you valuable time.

Experience the convenience and peace of mind that comes with our Chrome extension. Try it today and discover why it's an essential tool for anyone managing multiple client accounts.
Unleash the joy of your web research. Save bookmarks to your personal library. Assist browsing with AI.

Perfect for students, professionals and curious minds.

Key features:

- Free and open-source. No user tracking & no ads.
- Integrates your browser with all popular AI assistants.
- Sends locally parsed web content to AI: generic articles, YouTube transcripts, X posts, Gmail emails, AI conversations, and more.
- You can sign up and build personal library with unlimited bookmarks.
- Private bookmarks are encrypted End-to-End with AES-CBC 256-bit, encryption key is derived with Argon2id, a combination considered unbreakable.
- Publish selected bookmarks to your public profile and connect with like-minded people.

Add Taaabs to your browser and unlock the joy of your web research!

Star on Github https://github.com/taaabs/taaabs

Q&A

Does Taaabs Web Clipper collect any data?
One of the main reasons for creating Taaabs is privacy. When using AI assistants, pages are parsed 100% locally and sent directly to supported assistants like ChatGPT using browser built-in communication channels. When you sign in to the service and start building your personal library of bookmarks, all data is secured through the use of end-to-end encryption locally your browser, no data ever leaves your computer unencrypted. We cannot know what you saved until you explicitly publish something to your public profile.

Is it free?
Thanks to local page parsing and using browser built-in communication channels, using AI features is totally free. All basic bookmarking features are free, including unlimited saves.
Streamlines navigation to GMGN Trading Bot, providing direct redirects or trade buttons for contracts found on crypto platforms.

GMGN Ai Trade Helper Chrome Extension: Seamless Multi-Chain Trading Navigation
Save 10% on your GMGN trading fees by signing up with our referral link: 
https://gmgn.ai/?ref=Leveling
referral Code: "Leveling"

Navigate the diverse world of crypto trading with unparalleled ease using the GMGN Helper Chrome Extension. Designed for efficiency, this powerful tool instantly connects you from various cryptocurrency information platforms directly to the relevant GMGN token page, supporting multiple blockchain networks.

Forget manual searches and copy-pasting token addresses. The GMGN Helper intelligently identifies contract addresses on popular analytics and trading sites across different chains (Solana, Ethereum, Base, BSC, Tron), providing immediate access to your desired GMGN trading interface.

Key Advantages:

Instant Access & Flexible Navigation:

Direct Redirects: Configure the extension to automatically send you from token pages on supported sites like DexScreener, Etherscan, Solscan, and more, straight to the corresponding GMGN token page for that specific contract and chain.

"Trade on GMGN" Button: Prefer a quick-click option? Display a discreet and draggable "Trade on GMGN" button on any supported page, offering instant access. Its position is conveniently saved per website for your comfort.

Tailored to Your Workflow:

Extensive Default Sites: Comes pre-loaded with a comprehensive list of popular sites across various blockchain ecosystems.

Customizable Actions: For each recognized site, decide whether to initiate an automatic redirect, show the trade button, or disable the extension's function.

Add Your Own Patterns: Expand the extension's capabilities by defining custom URL patterns for any website. If a site displays contract addresses, you can integrate it into your GMGN workflow.

Boost Your Trading Efficiency:
By automating the link between information and trading, GMGN Helper helps you save valuable time, reduce errors, and respond swiftly to market movements.

Effortless Setup: Get started quickly with an intuitive interface and a robust set of pre-configured options.

How It Works:
The GMGN Helper intelligently scans the URLs you visit. When it detects a pattern associated with a contract address on a supported site (from its configurable list), it constructs the correct multi-chain GMGN URL. It then either redirects your tab or presents a clickable "Trade on GMGN" button, pre-populated with the relevant contract, to streamline your trading journey.

A plugin that augments Google and Stackoverflow search results with ChatGPT responses.

When you search for something on Google or Stackoverflow,  this extension will try to augment the results with the response from OpenAI's ChatGPT. You must have the ChatGPT bot open in a tab (https://chat.openai.com/chat). 

This extension will ask the bot the searched query in that chat tab, and pipe the results into your Google and Stackoverflow search results. 

By default, the extension only sends the query to ChatGPT window when you open the sidebar by clicking on the 🤖 button. But you can change the extension settings to automatically trigger ChatGPT search. Note that if set to automatic, you may inadvertently reach limits to your free ChatGPT usage.

Pertento – Lightweight, Privacy-First Experimentation Platform

Pertento lets you create, launch, and analyze A/B tests and personalized experiences directly from your browser, without compromising performance or privacy.

The Chrome extension connects seamlessly to your site, enabling real-time editing and instant deployment through Pertento’s ultra-light script under 0.6 KB, making it the world’s most efficient experimentation platform.

Built for professional optimization teams, Pertento supports multivariate, redirect, and server-side experiments, with multiple significance calculations running in real time, including sequential analysis (SPRT) and other advanced algorithms that ensure fast, accurate results even with limited traffic.

Why Pertento:
• Blazing fast: under 0.6 KB client script, almost invisible to Core Web Vitals
• GDPR compliant: 100% European infrastructure, no cookies utilized
• Accurate data: real-time analytics and sequential analysis for early, valid conclusions
• Flexible integration: works with any website, CMS, or e-commerce platform

Launch experiments in seconds. Iterate faster. Respect your users’ privacy.
Supercharge your viewing across YouTube, JioHotstar and SonyLIV: Double-tap to skip, Playback speed, Looping, Bookmarks.

Supercharge your viewing across YouTube, JioHotstar and SonyLIV — directly inside the native player.

One extension. Three streaming sites. Zero clutter. Tired of digging through nested menus to change quality, fighting with the seek bar to jump 10 seconds, or watching the "Skip Ad" button mock you for 4 seconds before letting you click it? Supercharge fixes all of that without bolting an ugly sidebar onto your browser. Every control lives natively inside the player so it feels like the streaming site shipped it itself.

WHAT YOU GET ON ALL THREE SITES (YouTube, JioHotstar, SonyLIV):
- Smart Double-Tap to Skip: Double-click the left or right side of the player to jump back/forward 10 seconds — exactly like the mobile app. Tap rapidly to skip further (20s, 30s, 40s…). Double-click the centre to toggle fullscreen.
- Playback Speed Control: A clean speed pill in the player bar. Slide, click a preset (1×, 1.25×, 1.5×, 2×, 3×), or fine-tune with the +/− buttons. Speed syncs across iframes so it actually sticks.
- Per-Site Toggles: Open the extension popup on any supported site and turn individual features on or off. Settings save instantly, no reload needed.

YOUTUBE EXTRAS:
- Auto Ad-Skipper: The "Skip Ad" button gets clicked the millisecond it appears. Zero interruption.
- A/B Timeline Looper: Drag handles on the progress bar to isolate any segment of the video and loop it perfectly. Built into YouTube's own settings bar.
- Frame-Accurate Bookmarks: Press 'B' to drop a pin on the timeline. Jump back to your favourite moments. Long-press a pin to remove it.
- One-Click PDF Export: Studying a lecture? Generate a print-ready PDF of all your bookmarks paired with their subtitle text. Landscape or portrait, your call.
- Quick Quality Switcher: Change resolution from a dedicated button on the player bar — no more diving into the gear menu.
- Instant Playback Speed Shortcut: Toggles between Normal, 1.5×, 2× with a single click; always shows your current speed.

DESIGNED TO STAY OUT OF THE WAY:
Disable any feature you don't want from the popup. The skip-feedback overlay won't trigger on existing buttons or menus. Double-clicking the player no longer text-selects the title bar. We sweat the details.

PRIVACY:
We don't track you. Settings are stored locally with chrome.storage. Optional feedback (when you choose to send it) goes to a Google Sheet we read manually.

Tip:
On YouTube, hit 'B' while watching to drop a bookmark instantly without touching your mouse.

Enjoy :)
#2.0.1
- JioHotstar: Fixed a bug where double-tapping near ads could leave the player in a desynced fullscreen state, freezing mouse input until fullscreen was exited manually.

#2.0.0
- Major: Unified extension now supports YouTube, JioHotstar and SonyLIV in one install.
- Per-site popup with individual toggles for every feature on every platform.
- JioHotstar / SonyLIV: Playback speed slider, double-tap to skip, double-click fullscreen, with overlay icons that match each site's native artwork.
- SonyLIV: Fixed exit-fullscreen on double-tap; speed control now anchors next to Video Quality / Subtitle & Audio.
- Hotstar / SonyLIV: Skip and fullscreen no longer trigger when tapping over native buttons or menus.
- All sites: Double-clicking the player no longer accidentally text-selects overlay titles.
- New: In-popup Send Feedback link and post-uninstall feedback page.

#1.2.0
- Added Instant Playback Speed shortcut button for one-click speed changes.
- Redesigned toolbar buttons for perfect vertical alignment and native circular aesthetics.
- Optimized Looper: Now starts inactive by default and resets precisely on every new video.
- Improved visibility: Added subtle gray shadows to skip feedback for better readability on white/bright screens.
- Refined code: Removed heatmap auto-detection for a faster and more predictable looper experience.

#1.1.0
- Added extension popup menu with feature toggles (Double-Tap, Bookmarks, Looper).
- Integrated Quick Quality Switcher for one-click resolution changes.
- Improved Double-Tap engine to prevent accidental video pausing.
- Optimized PDF export layouts.

#1.0.0
- Initial Release!
- Features: Auto ad-skip, custom double-tap skip engine, A/B timeline segment looper, bookmark engine with full PDF export support.

Automaticly creates a bot command for e.g. Discord from a Youtube page. You can assign the prefix by clicking the extension icon.

This extension creates a bot command and copies it to your clipboard with just a click on a Youtube page. These commands use a prefix like !play or -play, but the prefix can be user defined by acccessing the extension popup. 
Bot !Play makes playing music from a chatbot in e.g. Discord a lot easier as you don't have to add the prefix manually. 

This is not a bot! This is only a Chrome extension, which adds a button to the Youtube layout, allowing you to copy the link to your clipboard.

Protect kids from adult and harmful content on the web

SafeBrowse Parent Control – Free parental control extension for Chrome. Block inappropriate websites, blur adult images, and filter bad words to keep kids safe online.

BEST PARENTAL CONTROL EXTENSION FOR CHROME

SafeBrowse helps parents protect children from adult content, inappropriate websites, and harmful material while browsing. Simple to set up, no account required. Your data stays on your device.

KEY FEATURES PARENTS NEED

✓ Block inappropriate websites – Built-in blocklist of adult and unsafe sites. Add custom sites to block or allow. Block porn, adult content, and any domain you choose.

✓ Blur adult images – Automatically blurs inappropriate images on Google Images and risky sites when kids search adult terms. Safe searches (e.g. school, games) show normally.

✓ Word filter – Replaces bad words and inappropriate language with ***** on any webpage. Customize your word list in the dashboard.

✓ Parent and child profiles – Switch to Child profile when kids use the browser; switch to Parent to browse without restrictions. Each child can have their own profile.

✓ Activity reports and insights – See what each profile tried to access and when. Blocked site attempts, top blocked domains, and per-profile activity. Know what your kids are doing online.

✓ Ask parent – Kids can request access to a blocked site. Parents approve for 15 minutes, 1 hour, or always from the dashboard.

✓ Schedule blocking – Set time-based rules so the web is blocked or allowed during specific hours (e.g. homework time, bedtime).

✓ PIN protection – Lock settings with a PIN so only parents can change rules or switch profiles.

✓ Privacy first – No cloud required. Blocking and filtering happen on your device. Export or delete your data anytime.

HOW TO USE SAFEBROWSE

1. Install the free parental control extension.
2. Set a PIN and create Parent and Child profiles.
3. Switch to Child profile when your child uses Chrome.
4. Open the dashboard (extension options) to view reports, adjust blocklists, and manage settings.

WHO IS SAFEBROWSE FOR?

• Parents who want to block inappropriate content for kids
• Families looking for free parental controls for Chrome
• Anyone who needs to filter adult websites and images
• Households with shared computers used by children

An AI-powered virtual assistant that helps you critically analyse news items and online content.

d-AI-logue is your virtual assistant for informed online reading.

Every day we come across vast amounts of online data, news and information, many of which lack accuracy or aim to mislead. d-AI-logue assistant was designed to deal with this challenge. 

Through thoughtful questioning and interaction, this virtual assistant trains you step by step to spot misleading content and disinformation.

d-AI-logue assistant empowers you to evaluate the accuracy of online information, guiding you to think critically and independently. 

By design, d-AI-logue assistant aims to support your journey toward media literacy and critical thinking. It is suitable for various types of online reading, from browsing websites to scrolling through social media, enhancing your media literacy skills. 

d-AI-logue assistant is specifically designed for citizens and youth, offering a dynamic and customised experience. This browser extension/add-on doesn’t just hand you fact-checked answers – it walks you through a dialectical process, helping you reach your own informed conclusions. 

Access to the d-AI-logue assistant is free and anonymous as it is installed within your browser as an extension/add-on. 

Key Features of the d-AI-logue assistant:

AI-Powered Guidance: You engage with an interactive assistant (chatbot) that uses reflective questioning to help you evaluate news and online content.

Micro-Lessons: You may access optional micro-lessons to deepen your understanding of media and digital literacy.

Easy Interface: The extension opens in a customisable browser sidebar that sits alongside the content you're viewing, providing real-time analysis, easily.

Adaptable User Interface: You can tailor the d-AI-logue experience to suit your preferences through the extension's settings menu, choosing from various options.

Keep an archive: You may save offline any content analysis performed for future reference, as well as your dialogues with the assistant.

More details...

Reading online and distinguishing trustworthy information from mis/disinformation is getting more and more challenging. d-AI-logue assistant is here to teach you how to analyse the accuracy of the information you read online by guiding you to think critically.

d-AI-logue assistant supports citizens, especially youth, who want to explore the reliability of information, by cultivating their critical thinking and by guiding them through a dialectical approach to reach their own conclusions. Instead of just consuming a fact-checking result, the use of d-AI-logue assistant cultivates an active, informed and critical stance.

How can this be achieved? This innovative virtual assistant guides you through reflective questioning to detect mis/disinformation signals in news items, empowering you to make informed decisions about their accuracy. For additional knowledge, you may dive deeper with optional micro-lessons and join our vibrant discussion forum for extra support in navigating the digital information landscape.

The d-AI-logue assistant extension offers a user interface contained in a browser “sidebar”, an area appearing next to a Web page. The user is able to customise this user interface according to their preferences. Available settings include the ability to select a light/dark theme (defaults to “auto”, trying to decide on a light/dark theme based on browser settings), the ability to show/hide the “header” (the top toolbar) and whether it can be “fixed” or “static”, the ability to control the navigation within the d-AI-logue extension, by selecting between a sidebar or a top-level menu, the ability to show the user menu, and the ability to set the text direction (left-to-right/right-to-left). Settings are stored in the browser’s cache and are remembered until the d-AI-logue extension is uninstalled.

Atmos is a powerful tool for organizing content and ideas online

 Overview

- Social Bookmarks - Leave notes and tags on any URL 
- Web Publishing - Connect your Webflow CMS and send content directly from the browser
- Private Social Layer - Invite your community into a private social layer that sits over top of the open web
- Link Feeds - Share your content with the world using our embedded Link Feeds.
- Atmos Canvas - Use our infinite canvas to map your knowledge and share it with others. 

Features

Leave notes on any URL
Atmos allows you to leave notes on any website. Use it to do research, as a robust bookmarking tool, or to share thoughts and insights with your community. You can even create private networks which restrict access to your notes to only people who are approved in your network.

Add tags to any URL
Take your notes one step further by adding notes and indexing URL's based on keywords. Use tags to filter your activity feeds and add context to your online browsing experience.

In-page highlights
Atmos allows you to highlight text from any website and save it as a block-quote with your page note. Eventually these notes will be on-page highlights and offer a more interactive way to mark up a website and leave notes, suggestions, or clarification on any website.

Connect your Webflow CMS
Create a network and connect your Webflow CMS to invite contributors to help you build out your website with no technical requirements. Multiple Webflow sites can be connected to a single network which makes this a great tool for marketing teams who want to let others add content to the site from around the web without ever needing to log into Webflow. Think about grabbing testimonials, social posts, news clippings, recipes, etc.

Build your contributor network
Atmos allows you to build private networks which limit who can see your notes as well as publish to connected websites. This is a powerful tool for existing online communities who want to add an interactive element to their community which can be accessed from any website on the internet.

This extension replaces a user's personal information with fake info on webpages

MaskMe is a powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance privacy and security for live streamers and video content creators. It allows users to create a list of sensitive information, such as real names or locations, that they wish to keep private during their live streams or video recordings. MaskMe then automatically replaces these sensitive words with user-defined substitutes across the web pages being displayed, minimizing the risk of accidental exposure of private information. With its real-time text replacement and intuitive interface, MaskMe is a must-have tool for anyone seeking to maintain their privacy while engaging with their audience online.
